findings.summary: Cross-session sweep added 2026-05-29 (workspace-sync.md line 77) is structurally impossible. Hypothesis (a) from DIRECTIVE-20260531-003 confirmed.
findings.evidence: ls /sessions/<foreign-id>/ → Permission denied; find /sessions -maxdepth 2 ... 2>&1 → ~3300 'Permission denied' lines (silenced by 2>/dev/null in the sweep); find ... 2>/dev/null → 0 paths exit 0. /sessions/<id>/ is owned by nobody:nogroup mode 750; agent uid 4419 has no group access. Cannot fix from within the agent's perms.
findings.disposition: Authored PROP-067 to retire the misleading sweep and document the operator-side fallback.

findings.summary: Directive's Option (ii) — move CLONE to /tmp/dome-sync-clone — ALSO unworkable. /tmp is mode 1777 (sticky) with cross-session UID namespace mapping; rm of foreign-owned /tmp files fails with Operation not permitted. Verified by direct test on /tmp/clean_clone.txt (restored after).
findings.evidence: ls -ld /tmp → drwxrwxrwt; rm /tmp/clean_clone.txt → Operation not permitted (exit 1); the file showed as nobody:nogroup despite being writable by its prior-session owner.
findings.disposition: Option (ii) explicitly rejected in PROP-067 non_patches_considered_and_rejected.

findings.summary: PROP-030 metrics: open_issues_total=65, assigned_analyst=43, assigned_tinker=0, age_ge_30d=0, oldest_open_age_days=0.47, closed_velocity_7d=134, new_velocity_7d=65, net_velocity_7d=+69, baby_drain_7d=4, verify_drain_7d=0. No thresholds firing.
findings.evidence: monitor/tinker/queue-history.jsonl tail. Net velocity positive — pipeline draining faster than filling.
findings.disposition: No action. (Note: initial computation used wrong field name `o.ts` instead of `closed_at` and produced velocity_7d=0; corrected at write-time before push. Documented in the _note field of the queue-history row.)
